dashboard.label: SOC KPI Dashboard
dashboard.description: Security Operations Center Key Performance Indicators — BankStack SOC

search.query: index=bankstack_wazuh rule.level>=10 | eval detect_time=_time - strptime(data.event_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | stats avg(detect_time) as avg_mttd | eval avg_mttd=round(avg_mttd/60, 1) | fields avg_mttd
index=bankstack_wazuh | timechart span=1h count by rule.level | rename 3 as Low, 5 as Medium, 8 as High, 10 as "Very High", 12 as Critical, 14 as "Severe", 15 as "Emergency"
index=bankstack_wazuh | stats count by data.system | sort -count | rename data.system as "Banking System"

index=bankstack_wazuh data.srcip=* | stats count, dc(rule.id) as unique_rules, max(rule.level) as max_severity by data.srcip | sort -count | head 10 | rename data.srcip as "Source IP", unique_rules as "Unique Rules", max_severity as "Max Severity"
index=bankstack_wazuh | eval severity=case(rule.level<=5, "Low", rule.level<=8, "Medium", rule.level<=10, "High", rule.level<=12, "Critical", rule.level>12, "Severe") | stats count by severity

index=bankstack_wazuh rule.level>=12 | table _time, rule.level, rule.description, data.srcip, user, data.system | sort -_time | head 20 | rename rule.level as "Level", rule.description as "Description", data.srcip as "Source IP", data.system as "System"
